title: alchemilla hybrida var. flabellata
intro: Alchemilla hybrida var. flabellata, also known as Lady's Mantle, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family, characterized by its large, rounded leaves and clusters of small white or pink flowers. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Alchemilla hybrida var. flabellata include reducing menstrual cramps, soothing digestive issues, and supporting wound healing, as well as exhibiting anti-aging and anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Lady's Mantle can be made into teas, infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
